mapper.delete: DELETE FROM student_course_rel WHERE studentId = #{studentId} AND courseId = #{courseId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.id,s.courseName,s.collegeId,s.startDate,s.endDate,s.credits,s.optional,s.primaryAmount,s.selected,s.remark,s.academicYear,s.classPlace,s.classDate,c.name collegeName,t.username teacherName FROM student_course_rel sc LEFT JOIN course s ON sc.courseId=s.id LEFT JOIN college c ON s.collegeId = c.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON t.id=s.teacherId WHERE sc.studentId=#{studentId} AND s.academicYear = #{courseAcademicYear}
SELECT id,academicYear,state FROM course_academic_year WHERE state='1'

SELECT count(1) courseNum, (CASE WHEN sum(c.credits)IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE sum(c.credits) END) creditsNum FROM student_course_rel sr LEFT JOIN course c ON sr.courseId=c.id WHERE sr.state='1' AND sr.studentId=#{id}

SELECT count(1) courseNum, (CASE WHEN sum(c.credits)IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE sum(c.credits) END) creditsNum FROM student_course_rel sr LEFT JOIN course c ON sr.courseId=c.id WHERE sr.studentId=#{id} AND sr.state='0'
SELECT count(1) courseNum, (CASE WHEN sum(c.credits)IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE sum(c.credits) END) creditsNum FROM student_course_rel sr LEFT JOIN course c ON sr.courseId=c.id WHERE sr.studentId=#{id}
SELECT id FROM course WHERE id=#{courseId} AND #{nowTime} > startDate AND #{nowTime} < endDate
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET selected = selected + #{useNumber} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.studentNumber, s.username, s.phone, s.email, s.collegeId, s.createDate, s.roleId, c.name collegeName FROM student s LEFT JOIN college c ON s.collegeId = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET phone = #{phone}, email = #{email} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, studentNumber, username FROM student WHERE studentNumber = #{studentNumber} AND password = #{password} AND state = '1'
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET password = #{newPassword} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT 1

SELECT s.id,s.courseName,s.collegeId,s.startDate,s.endDate,s.credits,s.optional,s.primaryAmount,s.selected,s.remark,s.academicYear,s.classPlace,s.classDate, c.name collegeName,t.username teacherName, CASE WHEN sc.id IS NOT NULL THEN '1' ELSE '0' END as type FROM course s LEFT JOIN college c ON s.collegeId = c.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON t.id=s.teacherId LEFT JOIN student_course_rel sc ON sc.courseId = s.id AND sc.studentId = #{studentId} WHERE s.collegeId = #{collegeId} AND s.academicYear = #{academicYear} AND s.courseName NOT LIKE '%体育%' ORDER BY s.courseName

SELECT id, academicYear, stageName, stageOrder, startDate, endDate, allowRecommend, allowPlan, allowOutside, state FROM selection_stage WHERE academicYear = #{academicYear} AND state = '1' AND startDate <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND endDate >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY stageOrder LIMIT 1
SELECT c.classDate FROM student_course_rel sc LEFT JOIN course c ON c.id = sc.courseId WHERE sc.studentId = #{studentId} AND sc.state = '0' AND c.classDate IS NOT NULL AND c.classDate != ''
mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS selection_stage ( id varchar(32) PRIMARY KEY, academicYear varchar(20) NOT NULL, stageName varchar(64) NOT NULL, stageOrder INTEGER NOT NULL, startDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, endDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, allowRecommend varchar(1) DEFAULT '1', allowPlan varchar(1) DEFAULT '0', allowOutside varchar(1) DEFAULT '0', state varchar(1) DEFAULT '1' )
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN sc.selectionType = 'recommend' THEN '推荐选课' WHEN sc.selectionType = 'plan' THEN '方案内选课' WHEN sc.selectionType = 'outside' THEN '方案外选课' ELSE '未分类' END as typeName, COUNT(1) as courseNum, CASE WHEN SUM(c.credits) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE SUM(c.credits) END as creditsNum FROM student_course_rel sc LEFT JOIN course c ON sc.courseId = c.id WHERE sc.studentId = #{studentId} GROUP BY sc.selectionType

SELECT co.name as collegeName, COUNT(1) as courseNum, CASE WHEN SUM(c.credits) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE SUM(c.credits) END as creditsNum FROM student_course_rel sc LEFT JOIN course c ON sc.courseId = c.id LEFT JOIN college co ON c.collegeId = co.id WHERE sc.studentId = #{studentId} GROUP BY co.name

SELECT c1.courseName as courseName1, c2.courseName as courseName2, c1.classDate as classDate1, c2.classDate as classDate2 FROM student_course_rel sc1 LEFT JOIN student_course_rel sc2 ON sc1.studentId = sc2.studentId AND sc1.courseId != sc2.courseId LEFT JOIN course c1 ON sc1.courseId = c1.id LEFT JOIN course c2 ON sc2.courseId = c2.id WHERE sc1.studentId = #{studentId} AND sc1.courseId < sc2.courseId AND c1.classDate IS NOT NULL AND c1.classDate != '' AND c2.classDate IS NOT NULL AND c2.classDate != ''

SELECT COUNT(1) as totalCourses, CASE WHEN SUM(c.credits) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE SUM(c.credits) END as totalCredits, SUM(CASE WHEN sc.state = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedCourses, SUM(CASE WHEN sc.state = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ongoingCourses, SUM(CASE WHEN sc.selectionType = 'recommend' OR sc.selectionType IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as recommendCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sc.selectionType = 'plan' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as planCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sc.selectionType = 'outside' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as outsideCount FROM student_course_rel sc LEFT JOIN course c ON sc.courseId = c.id WHERE sc.studentId = #{studentId}
